To make your changes permanent so that every visitor (and every browser) sees them, you need to "commit" your edits to the source code:

I'm currently structuring the reflection section within the `App.tsx` file using a grid layout.  I've incorporated a section title and the main text within it. The structure uses a "Reflection" block with an icon and the text. Next, I'm integrating this to the project, with attention to detail.


**Implementing Final Touch**

I've added the "fin" text, using a subtle, all-caps design, to visually signal the project's conclusion. It's now integrated at the end of the reflection section to reinforce this visual cue. The code and styling have been updated, and I'm ensuring it integrates smoothly within the overall reflection block.


**Integrating "fin" Text**

I've been iterating on the "fin" text placement and styling. Currently, it's integrated within the "Reflection" block to visually signal the end, in line with the feedback.
